name: Springerle German Christmas Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir all ingredients except anise together in a large bowl until well combined.
2. Cover the mixture and let stand at room temperature for about two hours to allow the flavors to meld.
3. Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface or pastry cloth using a rolling pin, creating your desired design with cookie cutters.
4. Cut into squares and arrange on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper for a short time to set the design.
5. Preheat the oven to 325°F (160°C).
6. Brush the baking sheets with butter and sprinkle each cookie with anise seeds.
7. Bake in the middle rack of the oven for 15 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
